calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion to Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition was filed. Sanctions of $600 plus $40 cost is granted. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert B. Peterson, Judgement Debtor
No appearances made by Plantiff.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
